# CalmWeb Icons

This directory contains the extension icons for CalmWeb.

## Current Icons

The existing icons are placeholders. Generate proper icons using one of these methods:

## Method 1: HTML Generator (Recommended)

1. Open `generate-icons.html` in a web browser
2. Click each "Download" button
3. Save files as `16.png`, `32.png`, `48.png`, `96.png`, `128.png`

## Method 2: Use the SVG

The `icon.svg` file can be converted using online tools:
- https://cloudconvert.com/svg-to-png
- https://convertio.co/svg-png/

Generate these sizes:
- 16x16
- 32x32
- 48x48
- 96x96
- 128x128

## Icon Design

- Dark background (#1a1a1a to #0d0d0d)
- Gray/white shield icon
- Purple checkmark accent (#a78bfa)
- Rounded corners (20px radius at 128px)
- Works on both light and dark browser themes
